brief_summary_anonymized: Heritage-fashion retainer wants to disrupt traditional ways of talking about traditional clothes without losing reverence.
strategic_insight: The clothes are traditional. The conversation about them shouldn't be. Sayyar's marketing should be as inventive as the garments want to be.
execution_summary: Heritage-Inversion: identify the assumed framing (reverential, slow, proud-only), reject it, build language that is irreverent in form but reverent in content. Double-meaning word as structural key.
what_made_it_work: Inverting the conversational frame keeps heritage feeling modern
Double-meaning word becomes the platform's structural anchor
Saudi specificity (Najdi mud-brick, sadu weaving) outperforms pan-Arab generic
what_would_NOT_transplant: Requires brand with actual heritage credentials — fake heritage reads as cosplay
Risks alienating older audience who expect reverential framing
